body.title: Update tier ladder — Ollama primary, OR luxury (D234)
body.result: D234 tier ladder inversion implemented. Ollama primary for all call levels. Background impulses no longer escalate to OR. Interactive level tries Ollama first; OR fires only as luxury fallback. DAG _local_preferred updated. CLAUDE.md updated. 460/467 tests pass (7 pre-existing). Commit f026cc52.
body.description: D234. Ollama is now the default inference engine (tier.2), not a fallback. OR is the luxury/tone path (tier.3), scarce, will exhaust. Update: (1) inference_gateway.py routing logic — Ollama fires before OR; (2) budget gate logic — OR fires only when quality matters and budget allows; (3) CLAUDE.md tier ladder reference table; (4) any OR-as-default routing assumptions. Direction: graph expands, LLM usage shrinks. Weaning signal: watch where calls escape to which tier.
